title: Rubber Defies Lightning
description: The crew and their allies use the Giant Jack and the battlefield itself to get Luffy close enough to stop Enel.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Noland, Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa. The crew and their allies use the Giant Jack and the battlefield itself to get Luffy close enough to stop Enel.

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: It's even bigger than the last one!

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Nami, aren't you going to escape?

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: And fly over to the ship?,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Take cover somewhere with solid footing!

summary: The crew and their allies use the Giant Jack and the battlefield itself to get Luffy close enough to stop Enel.
